title: Turkish Keto Cheese Boregi
description: A Turkish-inspired keto cheese boregi recipe made with rich and creamy feta cheese. Perfect as a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Feta cheese
ingredients.notes: Crumble the feta cheese before using

ingredients.name: Intensely rich filo dough
ingredients.notes: Thaw the filo dough according to package instructions

instructions: Thaw the filo dough according to package instructions.
Cut the filo dough into 4 equal pieces.
Place a quarter of the feta cheese in the center of each piece.
Fold the filo dough into a triangle, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the boregi on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops with a little su (water) and sprinkle with Turkish cheese boregi spices (if using).
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
